category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a sliding, tiling window manager for macOS.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project for paneru.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/karinushka/paneru; per instructions, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists the paneru command-line executable.
